full_text:
Tao Huang (Shiying) 陶璜 (世英)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tao Huang (陶璜), styledShiying (世英), was born in Moling in Danyang. Fought against rebels and Jin when serving Wu, a popular governor of Jiaozhi for 30 years. Tao Huang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
